title: Potion Foods
description: In a crafting table the desired potion is placed into the middle and is surrounded by eight food items. The resulting foods will each retain their food stats as well as having the potion's effects when eaten.
body:
Potion Foods give players the ability to combine foods with potions.

 

In a crafting table the desired potion is placed into the middle and is surrounded by eight food items. The resulting foods will each retain their food stats as well as having the effects from the potion when eaten.

 

Only regular bottled potions can be used to craft potion foods.

 

To make a potion cake it takes one cake and one potion. The output is one cake.

 

Aims to help players carry more potions without cluttering the inventory.
